name: Sm Peaches and Cream Turnovers
recipeInstructions: Preheat sandwich maker. Prepare pie crust and roll out the two crusts to about 11 inches by 11 inches, folding each for easy handling. In a blender or food processor, combine egg, cream cheese, and powdered sugar until smooth. Open the lid and carefully lay the first square of pie dough over the entire surface. With the back of a spoon, push the dough down into pockets and spoon the peach filling into the pockets. Top with the cream mixture, dividing between 8 pockets. Lay the second square of dough over the filling, allowing excess to hang over the sides. Lower the top and bake for about 10 minutes or until the dough is golden brown. Makes 8 turnovers.
